summary: This image shows the exterior entrance of a Lonza facility, featuring glass doors with Lonza Specialized Modalities branding, flanked by decorative art sculptures. It is a photograph of a building entrance with no scientific, technical, or business development content relevant to TRL assessment.

content_blocks.content: Exterior photograph of Lonza facility entrance with glass doors displaying 'Lonza Specialized Modalities' branding. Decorative DNA helix sculpture on left side and plant arrangement on right side. Parking lot visible in reflection. No scientific or technical information present.
